common.tagline: From a plain request to a polished proposal.
common.errorGeneric: We could not complete that. Please try again.
common.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.

landing.heroTitle: Turn a plain-language request into a proposal worth signing.
landing.heroSubtitle: Proposa reads the brief, matches it to your service catalog, prices it in any currency, and writes a tailored proposal in English, Spanish, or Portuguese.
landing.beforeAfterTitle: Structured data in. A finished document out.
landing.beforeAfterSubtitle: We never guess. Your request is parsed into constraints, matched against the catalog, and converted at live exchange rates before a single word is written.
landing.beforeRequest: Need a marketing site, ~8 pages, with SEO and a blog. Budget around R$25,000, live in 6 weeks.
landing.afterScopeText: An eight-page marketing website with on-page SEO and an editorial blog, delivered in six weeks.
landing.feature1Body: Budget, timeline, and intent are parsed from plain language so nothing is missed.
landing.feature2Body: Every line item is matched and ranked against your real services, converted at live FX.
landing.feature3Body: A warm cover note, itemized table, timeline, assumptions, and terms, in the client's language.
landing.feature4Body: Chat to adjust scope, swap items, or change tone. Every revision is saved.
landing.ctaTitle: See your first proposal in seconds.
landing.ctaBody: No setup. One click drops you into a live demo with a seeded catalog and sample quotes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Proposa workspace.
auth.name: Full name
auth.demoSubtitle: Jump straight into a live workspace, no account needed.
auth.demoHint: One click loads a real session with seeded data.
auth.invalidCredentials: That email or password is incorrect.
auth.registerFailed: We could not create your account.
auth.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists.

studio.title: Studio
studio.subtitle: Describe the work. Proposa drafts the proposal.
studio.requestPlaceholder: Describe the project in plain language. Include budget, timeline, and goals if you have them. Example: "A marketing website, about 8 pages, with SEO and a blog. Budget around R$25,000, live in six weeks."
studio.hintsPlaceholder: Anything to emphasize: tone, must-have items, constraints…
studio.generatingHint: Reading the brief, matching the catalog, and writing the document.
studio.emptyBody: Fill in the request and Proposa will draft a complete, itemized proposal you can refine and export.
studio.refineSubtitle: Ask for changes and the proposal updates.
studio.refinePlaceholder: e.g. Add a maintenance retainer and soften the tone.
studio.refineEmpty: No revisions yet. Ask for a change to start.
studio.rateLimited: You have reached today's generation limit. Try again tomorrow.
studio.generateFailed: We could not generate the proposal. Please try again.
studio.refineFailed: We could not apply that change. Please try again.
studio.requestRequired: Describe what you need before generating.
studio.loadFailed: We could not load that quote.

examples.marketingSite: Marketing website, ~8 pages, SEO + blog, R$25,000, live in 6 weeks
examples.mobileApp: Cross-platform mobile app MVP with login and payments, budget $40k, 3 months
examples.brandIdentity: Brand identity: logo, palette, and a one-page style guide for a coffee startup

proposal.matchedIntro: The structured inputs Proposa used before writing this proposal.

quotes.deleteBody: This permanently removes "{title}". This cannot be undone.

quotes.loadFailed: We could not load your quotes.
